title: Horizon Runner
description: Run, jump, and dash across procedurally-shifting horizons. Each level builds itself around a fresh theme — forest, snowfield, lava cavern, twilight ruins — with platforms, coins, hazards, and a checkpoint banner. Three lives, infinite levels, climbing difficulty.
short_description: A side-scrolling runner with procedurally-themed levels, coins, checkpoints, and three lives.
controls_keyboard: Arrow keys or WASD to move and jump. Space to jump. Hold direction + jump for longer leaps.
controls_gamepad: Left stick to move. A / South button to jump.
art_direction: Soft painterly side-scrolling platformer hero in a lush procedural landscape, vibrant gradient sky, dramatic horizon lighting, indie game key art.
